title: Shelf Gem
description: A Gem is a curated, verified piece of knowledge in the Shelf platform representing a discrete answer, article, or knowledge unit.

content.description: The full text content of the Gem.

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering the Gem.

knowledgeBaseId.description: ID of the knowledge base this Gem belongs to.

authorId.description: User ID of the Gem author.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the Gem was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the Gem was last updated.

publishedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the Gem was published.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the Gem content.

viewCount.description: Number of times this Gem has been viewed.

helpfulCount.description: Number of times users marked this Gem as helpful.

attachments.description: List of file attachments associated with the Gem.
